component.name: Tideway
component.summary: Native Tidal client with hi-res playback and downloads

description.p: Tideway is a native desktop client for Tidal. It plays your library bit-perfect, gaplessly, at the highest quality Tidal offers, and lets you download tracks and albums for offline listening. It also pulls scrobbling history from Last.fm and Spotify into a unified listening view.

ul.li: Bit-perfect, gapless audio across formats and sample rates
FLAC, MQA, Dolby Atmos, and hi-res downloads
Parametric EQ, crossfeed, ReplayGain, and a Signal Path readout
Cast to Chromecast, DLNA, AirPlay, and Tidal Connect targets
Last.fm scrobbling and Spotify listening-history import

description.p: This app is not made by Tidal. It talks to the same private endpoints the official Tidal apps use; use your own account at your own risk.
Fixed a freeze on track change where the previous track's audio stream wasn't reopened, leaving the new track in state=playing with no sound.
